title: Discord Channel Settings
description: Configuration for the Discord channel plugin

bot_token.description: Discord Bot Token (from Discord Developer Portal)

allowed_guild_ids.description: Guild (server) IDs the bot should respond in. Empty = all guilds.

allowed_channel_ids.description: Channel IDs the bot should listen to. Empty = all channels in allowed guilds.

respond_to_dms.description: Whether the bot should respond to direct messages

respond_to_mentions_only.description: In guild channels, only respond when @mentioned (recommended for busy servers)

command_prefix.description: Legacy command prefix (e.g. '!' or '/'). Leave empty to disable prefix commands.

streaming_throttle_ms.description: Minimum interval (ms) between edit-in-place streaming updates

max_message_length.description: Max characters per Discord message (Discord limit is 2000)

status_message.description: Custom status / activity message for the bot
